holdings.infoBox: MDPL is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are KBR, Inc. stock at 3.79%, Oshkosh at 3.73%, FactSet Research Systems at 3.64%, Cognizant Technology Solutions at 3.52%, and Genpact at 3.51%.

overview.description: The Monarch Dividend Plus ETF (MDPL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Monarch Dividend Plus index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of 30 dividend-paying stocks that are expected to provide dividend income and capital appreciation. MDPL was launched on Mar 6, 2024 and is issued by Monarch.
